_comment: OUR OWN content (NOT ROM-derived) — safe to commit. Defines which sprite groups are hostile and the enemy spawners. Each spawner owns a fixed pool of enemy slots, appended after the extracted NPCs on BOTH client and server so wire ids stay aligned. Slots start inactive (hp 0 = hidden); the server activates them at the spawn point over time, they roam town-wide, and on death they return to the pool to be re-activated.
